title: Father There Is Only One 2
originalTitle: Padre no hay más que uno 2: la llegada de la suegra

tmdbOverview: The success of the Conchy virtual assistant (which was developed by Javier) has earned him a favorable spot in the parents chat room - until something unexpected ruins it all.
synopsis: Father There Is Only One 2 is a 2020 comedy and family film from Spain. It has a 5.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a L certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
